01 —

About Me

Meta Ads specialist · AI prompt engineer · Creative lead · Growth marketer. I'm Filip Eremita, based in Rečica ob Savinji, Slovenia.

Currently at 2Digit d.o.o. — managing large-scale Meta campaigns across Italy, Hungary, Poland, and Czechia, with 6-figure monthly ad spend managed profitably. My focus is on high-performance e-commerce architecture: high-converting product pages, cross-border scaling, and creative systems that compound.

I have a proven track record with high-ticket products, Advantage+ Shopping vs. CBO/ABO campaign architecture, Pixel & CAPI setup, and Lookalike scaling. I also navigate Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) — adapting content to capture high-intent traffic from AI-powered search engines.

I work AI-first: Sora, Veo3.1, Gemini, Nano-banana, Firefly are daily production instruments — not experiments. I also do vibe coding: building custom tools, dashboards, and automations when off-the-shelf solutions don't fit.

Core Skills

⚡↗
Performance Ad Creatives
5+ years independently creating, testing, and iterating paid ad creatives across 13 countries. Cross-border scaling in IT, HU, PL, CZ with large monthly budgets. I understand the difference between a creative that looks good and one that converts — and I build for the latter.
MetaGoogle PMaxCBO/ABOAdv+CAPI
🤖↗
AI-First Creative Production
Using Sora, Veo3.1, Firefly, Gemini, Nano-banana, and Canva AI as daily production instruments for both images and videos in live campaigns. Not just experimentation — real output, real quality control.
SoraVeo3.1FireflyGeminiCanva AI
📸↗
Photography & Visual Composition
10+ years as a professional photographer across nature, commercial, and wedding verticals. Internationally recognised at CIPAFE 2019 in China. A trained visual instinct that directly improves every ad I design.
CompositionLightroomRetouchingCIPAFE '19
🖨️↗
Production & Quality Management
9 years running a print house — production scheduling, QC, client briefing, deadline management, staff delegation. I understand what delivering consistently at scale actually means, not just in theory.
QCDeadlinesInDesignPhotoshop
✍️↗
Copy & Concept Writing
Writing short, punchy performance copy in Slovenian (native) and English (C2). Headlines, hooks, CTAs — built for each platform and audience. Understanding what messaging drives clicks in a performance context.
SL NativeEN C2HeadlinesCTAs
🎯↗
Multi-Format & Multi-Platform
Native production in 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9, and 2:3 — for Meta, Google Display, Taboola, Outbrain, and Reddit. Rethinking visual hierarchy and CTA placement for each format, not just resizing.
1:14:59:1616:92:3
🧑‍💻↗
Vibe Coding
Building custom tools, dashboards, and automations with AI assistance — Claude, GPT, Cursor — when off-the-shelf solutions don't fit the workflow. HTML, CSS, JS, Python for practical production and campaign tooling. Ship fast, iterate faster.
ClaudeCursorHTML/CSS/JSPythonAutomations
03 —

How I Work

On Meta in 2025–2026, the creative is usually the targeting. My workflow is built around that reality — test fast, localize hard, optimise relentlessly.

Meta Ads infrastructure
  • ✦ Advantage+ Shopping vs. CBO/ABO architecture
  • ✦ Lookalike scaling, broad vs. niche targeting
  • ✦ Conversions API (CAPI) + Meta Pixel data integrity
  • ✦ Cost caps for high-ticket products
  • ✦ Cross-border scaling: IT · HU · PL · CZ + CEE
  • ✦ ROAS · CAC · LTV analysis & bidding strategy
Creative testing framework
  • ✦ Modular systems: hooks vs. visuals vs. copy
  • ✦ CTR and hold rate analysis per creative
  • ✦ Strategic creative cycling to combat ad fatigue
  • ✦ AI prompt engineering for 100s of copy variations
  • ✦ Multilingual: EN · IT · PL · SL · HU · CZ · SK
  • ✦ Static image heavy, direct-response first
CRO & landing pages
  • ✦ Landing page psychology & post-click friction reduction
  • ✦ Ad message ↔ product page alignment
  • ✦ High-converting e-commerce product page architecture
  • ✦ Emotional + practical benefit framing per market
  • ✦ Seasonal angles, urgency, transformation storytelling
  • ✦ High-ticket product strategy & funnel design
AI & emerging channels
  • ✦ Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
  • ✦ AI-powered creative asset production at scale
  • ✦ Google Performance Max strategy
  • ✦ Native: Taboola · Outbrain · Reddit
  • ✦ Vibe coding — custom tools & dashboards
  • ✦ The creative is the targeting — always.

Work History

Nov 2020 — Present
4+ years
● Current
Spletni oglaševalec (Online Advertiser)
2Digit d.o.o. · Full-time · Mengeš, Slovenia
  • Developing and running Meta/Facebook Ads campaigns across 13 countries, having managed 6-figure ad spend profitably across e-commerce, lead gen, and B2B verticals.
  • Independently creating effective ad copy, image creatives, and video content for direct-to-consumer campaigns.
  • Using AI tools — Sora, Gemini, Veo3.1, Nano-banana — to generate video and image assets for live campaigns.
  • Using Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, CapCut, Figma, and Canva to produce platform-ready creative assets.
  • Testing and optimising creative solutions based on performance metrics; monitoring KPIs across countries.
  • Adjusting strategy and creative approach based on data — not just aesthetics.
Jan 2015 — Present
10+ years
● Current
Fotograf (Professional Photographer)
Eremita's s.p. · Self-employed · Reica ob Savinji

  • Internationally recognised: China International Photographic Exhibition (CIPAFE, 2019).
Dec 2011 — May 2020
8.5 years

  • Creating and maintaining websites using WordPress for clients.
Dec 2010 — Dec 2011

Why Me

01
Proven at scale
6-figure Meta spend managed profitably
Not portfolio projects or case studies — real campaigns, real budgets, real ROAS. 5+ years at 2Digit running live Meta campaigns across 13 countries with direct ownership of creative, copy, and performance.
02
AI-native, not AI-curious
Sora, Veo3.1, Firefly, Gemini — daily tools
Using AI for image and video asset generation in live campaigns, not experiments. The workflow is built around AI-first production — faster iteration, lower cost per creative, more testing surface.
03
Creative + analytical
I understand why an ad works, not just how it looks
I write copy, track KPIs across countries, and iterate creatives based on performance signals. A photographer's trained eye for composition combined with a marketer's obsession with what converts.
04
Multilingual copy
Slovenian native · English C2 · 13 markets
Writing punchy performance copy in Slovenian and English for real audiences across Europe. Adapting hooks, CTAs, and messaging for cultural context — not just translation.
05
Vibe coder
Builds tools when the right one doesn't exist
Using Claude, Cursor, and GPT to build custom dashboards, automations, and production tooling. When a workflow problem needs a technical solution, I build it — fast, practical, ship-ready.
06
Reliable by track record
9 years managing a production floor
Ran a print house with staff for 9 years under daily production deadlines. Reliability and follow-through aren't soft-skill claims — they're demonstrated over a decade of work before ads even entered the picture.
